title: rosa mollissima subsp. resinoides
intro: Rosa mollissima subsp. resinoides, also known as the Chinese rose or fragrant rose, is a subspecies of the Rosa mollissima plant, which is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rosa mollissima subsp. resinoides include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, Rosa mollissima subsp. resinoides is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
